chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S-352 of 2024 ___________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ______________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE. 1. For orders on office objection as at “A”. 2. For orders on CMA No. 3228 of 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 17-03-2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ---------------- The Petitioner Nos.1 and 2 are present in person but their counsel is called absent. The Petitioners contend that they have contracted marriage freewill in the year 2016 and since then private Respondents are causing harassment to Petitioners and they apprehend they will be murdered at the hands of Respondent Nos.6 to 12 and despite repeated reminders, the SHO, P.S Moro has failed to protect them. The Petitioners No.1 contends that she is a Police Constable and the Petitioner No.2 is a Government Teacher and presently residing at Islamabad colony at Shadadpur. The Petitioner is performing his job within the jurisdiction of P.S. Mandasi, District Sanghar and the Petitioner No.1 is performing her duties. The SHO, P.S. Maldasi, District Sanghar and P.S. Shadadpur so also the SHO, P.S. Moro, SSP Sanghar are directed to ensure the protection of the Petitioners in accordance with the law. It is made clear that if any harms caused to the Petitioners by the private Respondents or official Respondents. SSP Sanghar is personally responsible and has to look into the matter and act in accordance with the law. It is the rights of the Petitioners reside and lead a family life in free and fair atmosphere as mentioned in the Constitution.

SSP Sanghar is personally responsible and has to look into the matter and act in accordance with the law. It is the rights of the Petitioners reside and lead a family life in free and fair atmosphere as mentioned in the Constitution. The Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Copy of this Order shall be communicated to the I.G. Sindh Police, DIG Benazirabad, SSP Sanghar and SSP Noshero Feroze for compliance. Since the Petitioner No.2 is a Teacher, therefore, the concerned SHO, P.S. attends his duties without fear and the under protection of the concerned Police. JUDGE Jamil
